distance_km.note: No reliable web sources found describing a cross-country ski race called Femund Ski Marathon. All results refer to Femundløpet/Femund Race as a sled dog race with distances like 450km, 650km.

elevation_m.note: No sources for a cross-country ski race; dog sled race Femundløpet mentioned but no elevation data.

country.note: Femundløpet is in Norway[1][2][3], but no confirmation of claimed ski race.

region_state_province.note: Femundløpet passes through Trøndelag and Innlandet[1], but Trøndelag alone unconfirmed for ski race; no ski race found.

discipline.note: No sources confirm classic skiing; Femundløpet is dog sledding with skijoring events[2].

field_size.note: Femund Race has many participants as 'world's largest by number'[6], but no specific number like 250 for ski race.

founded.note: No founding year found for claimed ski race; Femundløpet dog race exists but year unstated in results.

official_website.note: https://www.femundlopet.no is official site for Femundløpet dog sled race[2][3], not confirmed for ski marathon.

race_date.note: Femundløpet dog race in February (e.g., 2025: Feb 8-15)[2][6]; mid-March unconfirmed for ski race.
